title: remove_member_and_maybe_delete_group: dead DELETE on group_members when remaining=0
description: store.rs: when remaining==0, a second DELETE FROM group_members runs after the member was already deleted. It is always a no-op; the subsequent DELETE FROM groups CASCADE-deletes any residual rows anyway. Dead code that misrepresents what the function does.
close_reason: Dead DELETE in remaining==0 branch is a no-op not a correctness bug; cascade DELETE from groups handles residual rows. Downgraded from P0 to non-issue.
